{{Quote|I heard from Gamorrean Interstellar. If you're still interested, they'll sell us the mining rights on Quiberon V for a streak'in 500,000, 10 percent down and we neg them for the rest over 10 standard.|Minas Derel, to Moxin Tark|<ref name="GG10" />}}
'''Quiberon V''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] situated in the [[Quiberon sector/Legends|Quiberon sector]]. The company [[Gamorrean Interstellar]] held [[Mining/Legends|mining]] rights there, which it eventually agreed to sell to the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Moxin Tark]] and his [[expeditor]] [[Minas Derel]].

==Description==
[[File:Quiberon_sector.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Quiberon V was situated in the Quiberon sector.]]
Quiberon V was a terrestrial<ref name="GG10" /> [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|63|Quiberon V}}</ref> that occupied the fifth [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position<ref name="GG10" /> in the [[Quiberon system/Legends|Quiberon system]], a part of the [[Quiberon sector/Legends|Quiberon sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA Quiberon" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It shared its name with [[Quiberon Kuat]], a [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] who, around [[800 BBY/Legends|800 BBY]], transformed the secret Quiberon [[Sector/Legends|sector]] world [[Rothana/Legends|Rothana]] into an important industrial hub for the company, and the [[Quiberon Line]], a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] that was used between [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]] and [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] to secretly transport [[Warship/Legends|warships]] and military vehicles designed for the planned [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] between Rothana and the [[Extragalactic/Legends|extragalactic]] world [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]], where the [[Cloning/Legends|cloned]] [[Army/Legends|army]] was being produced.<ref name="EGTW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>

==History==
At some point between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]'' is set between the events of {{Film|IV}} and {{Film|VI}}, which corresponds to the [[Time/Legends|time]] period between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> the licensed [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[expeditor]] [[Minas Derel]] negotiated with the [[Gamorrean Interstellar]] company, which held<ref name="GG10" /> [[Mineral/Legends|mineral]]<ref name="CSWE" /> [[Mining/Legends|mining]] rights on Quiberon V, a discounted sale of those rights to them and their client, the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] [[Moxin Tark]]. Derel informed Tark of the deal via [[Holovid/Legends|holovid]] call, with the latter complimenting the former on it. The conversation was recorded, and the portion of it mentioning the Quiberon V deal was later extracted.<ref name="GG10" />

==Behind the scenes==
Quiberon V was introduced in "[[Makin' It Happen]]," a short companion narrative included in the [[1994]] sourcebook ''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]''. The book was authored by [[Rick D. Stuart]] and published by [[West End Games]] for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="GG10" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Quiberon [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Quiberon V, in grid square T-15.<ref name="TEA Quiberon" />
